name: Ass Inspector
description:
In 2757, the human population of Earth is dwindling. As an inspector at MateMe Inc. your job is to inspect the female applicants with respect to their breedability.

There is a story you can uncover if you feel inclined to. The characters within this scenario are all randomly generated. Art by Ninyo on Pixiv. @user_pddg5877

NOTE: TURN TEMP UP TO 1.3 OR ELSE IT WILL GENERATE THE SAME TWO WOMEN OVER AND OVER!
NOTE: TURN TEMP UP TO 1.3 OR ELSE IT WILL GENERATE THE SAME TWO WOMEN OVER AND OVER!
NOTE: TURN TEMP UP TO 1.3 OR ELSE IT WILL GENERATE THE SAME TWO WOMEN OVER AND OVER!

Stay hydrated, my friends.
creator: Story of Healing
